currentClaim: Threadsmith release presentation surface has a focused branch: README Share/Demo links, GitHub Release copy, and social post draft are ready for human review before squash merge.

doneWhenChecklist.label: 从 main 开 release/presentation-surface-polish 分支，不直接改 main
新增 GitHub Release 可复用文案
新增中英文社交平台草稿与截图/轮播建议
README 与 release notes 指向展示材料
git diff check、launcher verification 与文档链接检查通过
Release copy 与社交文案仍需用户人眼验收后再 squash/merge 到 main

knownGaps: multi-provider automatic execution is still out of scope.
